text:
(In reply to Ed Maste from comment #11)

> Thanks this patch looks reasonable, I'll merge it shortly ...

Thank you. May be you like to wait a little longer, because today I found
some time to work on a slightly different patch, which aims to set the
LED modes from the FDT data too, as Ian Lepore suggests in comment #7.
